summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Game Insight HUD - real-time gaming assistant app with GPT-5.2 vision analysis. Fixed critical backend API issue and verified all functionality works correctly.
passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (status, sessions, analyze, chat, TTS)
Landing page loads with hero section and capture method selection
Browser and desktop capture options selectable
Start Session button navigation to dashboard works
Dashboard loads with screen preview, AI insights, and chat panels
Settings modal opens and controls work (auto-analyze, voice settings)
Chat functionality works (send messages, get AI responses, clear chat)
Back navigation to landing page works
OpenAI TTS integration working (both regular and base64)
WebRTC screen capture UI ready (requires user permission)
All data-testid attributes present for testing
